title: Software Engineer
summary: Led the development of concurrent customs reporting systems and RPA engines, improving data ingestion speed by 10x using Go and Python.
description: Engineered and maintained Go-based backend services and Python-powered microservices for a logistics and customs-compliance platform, opening 367 Pull Requests and shipping 267 merges to production within a 13-month tenure, contributing over 86,000 lines of production-stable code across three core repositories.

Designed and implemented goroutine-based concurrent worker pools and channel fan-out patterns in Go to parallelize batch document fetching, materially reducing list-endpoint latency on high-traffic tenant queries and stabilizing critical-path read pipelines under production load.

Architected a multi-strategy OCR fallback pipeline (Gemini AI primary → PNG rasterization → PyMuPDF) and a parallel 10-thread worker pool for invoice/packing-list extraction, raising completeness of multi-page enterprise document ingestion to near-100% on edge cases that previously produced silent page-loss.

Spearheaded Linux-based cloud infrastructure on a self-managed VPS, deploying four systemd-managed autonomous daemons with `Restart=always` self-healing, authoring an idempotent recovery wrapper, and applying a four-layer RAM-hardening profile (GOMAXPROCS caps · systemd MemoryMax · zram zstd-compressed swap · in-loop test prevention) that eliminated OOM incidents without infrastructure cost increase.

Architected and deployed a production-grade automation pipeline that seamlessly integrates an enterprise task-management system (Asana) with Anthropic Claude API via a real-time idempotent webhook router, achieving end-to-end spec-to-Pull-Request automation while enforcing conventional-commit format, four-layer test gates, and manual human review at the production promotion step.

Designed and optimized PostgreSQL repositories and per-service SQLite isolation patterns, resolved a critical multi-tenant data-leakage scoping defect on a high-traffic list endpoint, and hardened cross-tenant boundaries to meet enterprise compliance audit requirements.

Built and stabilized integrations with multiple government-grade external APIs — national customs submission, electronic Certificate-of-Origin validation, and currency exchange-rate synchronization — with retry, fallback, and scraper-based resiliency to guarantee operability under upstream outages.

Implemented ISO-27001-aligned token lifecycle management, Microsoft Azure-AD SSO, and a three-tier PDF repair pipeline (Ghostscript / pdfcpu / qpdf) for corrupted-upload recovery, reducing failed-upload rate on high-stakes regulatory document submissions.

Bootstrapped a four-layer CI test workflow (build / unit / integration / regression / e2e) across three repositories, authored production-grade multi-stage Dockerfiles (Go backend, Next.js standalone frontend, Python microservice), and codified a `staging-as-divider` branch model with hard-rule SOP to enforce manual production promotion and zero auto-deploy to live customer environments.

Championed the integration of advanced AI coding assistants (Claude Code CLI, Claude API) into the core engineering workflow, accelerating feature-delivery cycles while maintaining high engineering standards through automated code review, conventional-commit enforcement, and reproducible production-grade Docker images.

title: Software Engineer
summary: Developed and maintained critical microservices and caching systems for Tokopedia Plus, enhancing subscription stability under high traffic.
description: Developed and maintained robust backend services for Tokopedia Plus using Golang, gRPC, GraphQL, NSQ, and Redis, ensuring high application performance and reliability.
Optimized inter-service communication and implemented effective Redis caching mechanisms, leading to faster API response times and improved resource efficiency.
Utilized Datadog for real-time system monitoring and trace logging, which streamlined troubleshooting and helped reduce system downtime.
Maintained high code quality standards within the team through rigorous peer code reviews and actively assisted junior members in resolving technical blockers.
Supported backend operations and maintained system stability during the company's acquisition phase through effective technical planning and cross-functional collaboration.
Collaborated closely with project managers and stakeholders to communicate progress, manage technical expectations, and ensure timely delivery of features.

title: Software Developer Officer
summary: Designed and implemented internal web applications from scratch, supporting UAT and business process automation.
description: Developed and maintained various internal web applications, collaborating with cross-functional teams to translate business requirements into functional software.
Built a dedicated web application from scratch based on management directives, handling the end-to-end development process to successfully meet stakeholder needs.
Supported the User Acceptance Testing (UAT) phase by actively identifying issues, implementing technical fixes, and ensuring system stability prior to deployment.
Delivered assigned application modules on schedule, consistently meeting code quality standards and improving operational workflows.

title: Software Engineer Intern
summary: Assisted senior engineers in developing and debugging responsive user interface components in an agile setting.
description: Contributed to the development of frontend features and UI components under the direct mentorship and guidance of senior engineers.
Assisted in debugging and implementing specific frontend enhancements, which helped improve overall application responsiveness and user experience.
Participated in agile team rituals and technical discussions to understand industry best practices, version control workflows, and coding standards.
Collaborated with the engineering team to support daily development tasks, executing assigned tickets effectively and efficiently.
